creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
We should not be addressing this problem in the manner suggested in
this sequence of nine or more PRs, by adding ad hoc changes to a
random collection of ports.  This is a problem that should be
addressed centrally in the local Makefiles or nanobsd customization
scripts of the submitter, by removing or altering the variables that
are polluting the build environments of the ports, in any of a number
of ways.  Please do not commit these patches.

b.
